content:
Can you believe Summer League is already finished! Thank you to everyone for taking part in our great summer league! Over the 10 weeks, there were 450 matches scheduled between the Tuesday & Thursday sessions.

Here are the final results:

Tuesday Division 1

Champions: Team 5 – Jeff Williams, Chris Cullingham, Brad Salter & Ryan Johnson
2nd Place Team: Team 3 – Andy Jugovics, Greg MacPhail, Stephen Visser & Jeff MacPherson
3rd Place Team: Team 1 – Clarke Wiebe, Jonathan Lacasse, Greg Bainbridge & Isaac El-Hayek

Tuesday Division 2

Champions – Team 2 – Ash Badry, Rob Music, Jared Cameron & Shanna Badry
2nd Place Team: Team 8 – Cody Hladki, Pierre Boucher, Steve Ampleman & Marilyn Brodeur
3rd Place Team: Team 6 – Ali Arshad, Darcy Cordell, Bret Waldner & Sandra Gawad

Thursday Session

Champions – Team 6 – Brad Hill, Gerry O’Donnell, Tony McClellan, Ross Vickery, Bret Waldner & Migo Kelada
2nd Place Team – Team 7 – Doug Kirillo, Ryan Johnson, Jim Soneff, Ian Douglas, Heather Sanregret & Adhikar Gokul
3rd Place Team – Team 4 – Chris Cullingham, Doug Popowich, Robin Chowdhury, Scott Seibel, Lindsay Buchanan & Margaret Fairbairn

If you enjoyed Summer League and want to get a jump on the Squash/Interclub season than the Fall Team League is a great program for you! It’s organized exactly the same as the Tuesday Summer League format but it runs for 7 weeks rather than 10 weeks. This is so it will finish the week prior to when the Interclub season begins. Here’s all of the key info for the Fall Team League:

Fall Team League
Dates: Aug 28 – Oct 9 (Tuesday evenings)
Times: 6pm-8pm & 8pm-10pm (alternates each week)
Cost: ESC Members – $84.00; Non-Members $126.00
Included:
– Evening munchies
– League souvenir
– Prizes for winning teams & Runner ups
Maximum of 64 participants and only 40 spots left! After this email it will fill up quickly so register NOW!
To register: Log into your account and click on REGISTER FOR ADULT PROGRAMS then click on SQUASH LEAGUES and then you can register from there. Otherwise please speak with the front desk and they can register you there.

Thank you again everyone for making the ESC Summer League fantastic! I really appreciate everyone’s participation and I hope to see you throughout the summer at our Summer Drop-in Mini-Tourneys on Tuesday or Thursday evenings. Division 1 & 2 nights will alternate Tuesdays Thursdays each week. Registration will open one week prior to the drop-in. For this weeks registration see below:
Tuesday July 24 Division 1 Register HERE
Thursday July 26 Division 2 Register HERE

Division 1 Drop-in Schedule
Division 2 Drop-in Schedule
